assessments.rationale: Surgical instruments require biocompatible material with documented ISO 10993 testing. ZOLLERN stainless grades (1.4021, 1.4028, 1.4112, 1.4542) are inherently biocompatible but require formal documentation.
assessments.mitigation: Provide ISO 10993 biocompatibility file for each stainless grade; maintain file currency with notified body

assessments.rationale: Material supplier must be on OEM's approved supplier list with ISO 13485 audit trail. ZOLLERN IATF 16949 is partial overlap but not equivalent.
assessments.mitigation: Extend quality system documentation to address ISO 13485 supplier audit requirements; provide UDI lot-level traceability

assessments.rationale: Martensitic stainless steels (1.4021, 1.4028) with proper passivation withstand >1,000 autoclave cycles at 134C. Standard ZOLLERN capability.
Cold-drawn profiles achieve Ra 0.4 um as-drawn. Meets instrument surface specification without additional polishing.

assessments.constraintName: Hardness Range (45-58 HRC for cutting instruments)
assessments.rationale: ZOLLERN stainless grades (1.4021, 1.4028, 1.4112) are hardenable to 50-60 HRC via through-hardening or precipitation hardening. Meets cutting instrument requirement.
ZOLLERN stainless profiles have Cr content >=12% enabling stable chromium oxide passive film formation per ASTM A967 passivation.
